message:
🌱 Add cartography: AWS Sync: Try all AWS accounts, and raise Exception mission (#1171)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cartography-773-aws-sync-try-all-aws-accounts-and-raise-exception-afterwards",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cartography: AWS Sync: Try all AWS accounts, and raise Exception afterwards",
+    "description": "AWS Sync: Try all AWS accounts, and raise Exception afterwards. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cartography deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cartography version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cartography -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cartography\nhelm list -n cartography 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working cartography installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cartography configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cartography configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cartography -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cartography\nkubectl get configmap -n cartography -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cartography\n```\n*Title*: *Try all AWS accounts, and raise Exception afterwards*\n\n*Description*:\nSometimes a single AWS account's sync could fail. In such situations, we more likely want to proceed with the rest of our accounts, but still be notified of the failure."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for AWS Sync: Try all AWS accounts, and raise Exception…",
+        "description": "How do we feel about enabling this as an optional cli switch?\n\n   I think it's okay to run the cleanup jobs, so long as all the cleanup jobs are account-specific. Most of them are, except for a few statements:\n*\n```yaml\nfailed_accont_ids = []\nfor account_id in account_ids:\n    try:\n        _sync_one_account(account_id)\n    except Exception as e:\n        logger.exception(e)\n        failed_accont_ids.append(account_id)\nif failed_accont_ids:\n    raise Exception(f'Syncs failed for accounts {failed_accont_ids}')\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cartography -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cartography\nkubectl get events -n cartography --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"AWS Sync: Try all AWS accounts, and raise Exception…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "How do we feel about enabling this as an optional cli switch?\n\n   I think it's okay to run the cleanup jobs, so long as all the cleanup jobs are account-specific.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "failed_accont_ids = []\nfor account_id in account_ids:\n    try:\n        _sync_one_account(account_id)\n    except Exception as e:\n        logger.exception(e)\n        failed_accont_ids.append(account_id)\nif failed_accont_ids:\n    raise Exception(f'Syncs failed for accounts {failed_accont_ids}')"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cartography",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "cartography"
+    ],

+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    ],

+  },
